text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Hey… I found this phone on the floor. 
Could you return it for me, please?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
No calls have come through yet, so whoever 
dropped it must still be close by…

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
And, you know… things like this contain, 
well… memories… and other important stuff.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
So don't keep them waiting… I'm sure they'd 
rather have you return their lost item than me.
